languages.text: {n}Несколько секунд — и преступник, лишенный оружия, уже стоит на коленях, скрученный блюстителями. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о его наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Несколько секунд — и преступник, лишенный оружия, уже стоит на коленях, скрученный блюстителями. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о его наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами

languages.text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"
languages.original_text: {n}Несколько секунд — и преступник, лишенный оружия, уже стоит на коленях, скрученный блюстителями. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о его наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами!"

traits.locale_text: {n}A few seconds later, the disarmed criminal is already on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Jocasta snarls:{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

{n}A few seconds later, the disarmed criminal is already on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Jocasta snarls:{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

{n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Jocasta snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

{n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Jocasta snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

languages.text: {n}Einige Sekunden später ist der Kriminelle entwaffnet und wird von den Wachen auf die Knie gedrückt. Sauerback knurrt: {/n} "Ich werde mich um seine Bestrafung kümmern, Lord Captain, es sei denn, Ihr wollt sie selbst vornehmen!"
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Einige Sekunden später ist der Kriminelle entwaffnet und wird von den Wachen auf die Knie gedrückt. Sauerback knurrt: {/n} "Ich werde mich um seine Bestrafung kümmern, Lord Captain, es sei denn, Ihr wollt sie selbst vornehmen!"

languages.text: {n}Quelques secondes plus tard, le criminel est désarmé et à genoux, maintenu au sol par les gardes. Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même ! »
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Quelques secondes plus tard, le criminel est désarmé et à genoux, maintenu au sol par les gardes. Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même ! »

languages.text: {n}几秒后，罪犯便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械制服。苏尔贝克咆哮道：{/n}“我会负责监督惩处这名罪犯，舰长大人，除非您更愿意亲自动手！”
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

traits.locale_text: {n}几秒后，罪犯便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械制服。苏尔贝克咆哮道：{/n}“我会负责监督惩处这名罪犯，舰长大人，除非您更愿意亲自动手！”

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de unos segundos, el criminal ha sido desarmado y está de rodillas, sujeto por los guardias. Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me ocuparé de castigarlo, Lord Capitán, ¡a no ser que prefiera ocuparse personalmente!».
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de unos segundos, el criminal ha sido desarmado y está de rodillas, sujeto por los guardias. Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me ocuparé de castigarlo, Lord Capitán, ¡a no ser que prefiera ocuparse personalmente!».

languages.text: {n}数秒後、武装を解かれた犯人はすでに膝をつき、衛兵に押さえつけられていた。ジョカスタは唸る：{/n}"大尉殿、お望みでないのなら、私が彼の処罰を見届けましょう！"
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the disarmed criminal is already on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Jocasta snarls:{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra suçlu silahsızlandırılıp diz çöktürülüyor, muhafızlarca yere bastırılıyor. Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Bizzat yapmak istemezseniz cezasını ben veririm Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra suçlu silahsızlandırılıp diz çöktürülüyor, muhafızlarca yere bastırılıyor. Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Bizzat yapmak istemezseniz cezasını ben veririm Lord Kaptan!"
